Why Home-Based Rehab

The best place to relearn how to live your life is where you actually live it.

Clinics teach you to walk on flat polished floors. We teach you to walk on the rug between your sofa and kitchen — the journey that matters most.

Real-World Progress

Practice climbing your stairs, navigating your kitchen, getting in and out of your bed — goals that actually matter.

Zero Travel Stress

No painful car journeys, no waiting rooms. Every session begins the moment your therapist arrives.

Family-Centred Care

Your loved ones are coached alongside you — building a confident, capable support team at home.

Our Specialist Services

Expert care, delivered at home.

Every programme begins with a face-to-face home assessment — tailored to your goals, delivered by a chartered specialist.

Hands-on specialist care
Evidence-based
physiotherapy — at home

Neurological Rehab

Neuro-plasticity exercises, balance training, gait retraining and upper-limb rehabilitation to rebuild real independence.

Stroke Parkinson's Multiple Sclerosis Brain Injury

Elderly Care & Mobility

Confidence-building mobility drills, home safety assessments and strength work to maintain freedom and dignity.

Fall Prevention Frailty Deconditioning Chronic Joints

MSK & Sports Rehab

Targeted treatment for musculoskeletal pain, sports injuries and post-operative recovery — from acute to chronic.

Back & Neck Pain Sports Injuries Post-Op Rehab Joint Pain

All sessions at your home · No waiting rooms

Book a Free Consultation
Areas of Care · Musculoskeletal

Additional MSK Services

Expert assessment and treatment across a broad range of musculoskeletal and post-operative conditions — every plan is evidence-based and tailored to your unique recovery goals.

01 · Spine & Nerve

Spine & Nerve Care

Comprehensive assessment and targeted rehabilitation for spinal and nerve-related conditions affecting movement and quality of life.

Includes
Sciatica Whiplash Chronic Neck/Back Pain Spinal Dysfunction Disc Issues
Discuss this pathway
02 · Orthopaedic

Orthopaedic & Post-Op Rehab

Expert rehabilitation following joint surgery and orthopaedic procedures, safely restoring strength, range of motion and confidence.

Includes
Hip & Knee Arthritis Post-Op Replacements Fractures Patellofemoral Pain
Discuss this pathway
03 · Limb Injuries

Upper & Lower Limb Injuries

Targeted treatment for soft-tissue and joint injuries of the arms, shoulders, legs, ankles and feet — from acute to chronic.

Includes
Tennis Elbow Carpal Tunnel Achilles Plantar Fasciitis Rotator Cuff
Discuss this pathway
Who We Are
Arul Kandan
Senior Consultant Physiotherapist
BPT · MSc · MCSP · HCPC (UK)
25+
Years Exp.
UK · Ireland
Malaysia · India

At Rapid Rehab At Home, we deliver premium home-based rehabilitation led by Senior Consultant Physiotherapist Arul Kandan. With over 25 years of international clinical experience, Arul has led therapy departments across the UK, Ireland, Malaysia and India.

Founded with a clear purpose: to make specialised, hospital-grade rehabilitation accessible at home — bridging the gap between acute hospital care and long-term independence, turning familiar surroundings into the most effective environment for recovery.

Compassionate Care

Every patient treated with dignity and empathy.

Clinical Excellence

Evidence-based, hospital-grade techniques at home.

Proactive Outcomes

Focused on function, fall prevention and quality of life.

Collaborative Teamwork

Seamless care with patients, families and professionals.

Our Vision

To redefine the standard of home-based rehabilitation — where ageing, neurological conditions, injury or surgery never determine a person's independence or quality of life.

Our Mission

To deliver highly specialised, compassionate physiotherapy directly to patients' doorsteps — accelerating recovery, restoring confidence and maximising independence.

Patient Stories

Real lives. Real recoveries.

"After my stroke, I thought I'd never walk independently again. Having a neuro-specialist come to my house changed everything."

M
Margaret T.
Neurological Rehab Patient

"Getting to a clinic after my total knee replacement was impossible. The orthopaedic rehab I received at home got me back to gardening weeks ahead of schedule."

J
James L.
Orthopaedic Patient
